Meaning.Vi: con ốc vít; trục vít; cái kẹp (dạng vít)
Meaning.En: A fastener with a helical ridge (thread) wrapped around a cylinder, used to hold objects together or to lift materials.
Meaning.Example: He tightened the screw with a Phillips screwdriver.

Situation.Vi: Thay ốc bị lỏng trong thiết bị điện tử.
Situation.En: Tightening a loose screw in an electronic device.

Situation.Vi: Chế tạo mô hình máy bay bằng gỗ, dùng ốc để lắp ráp.
Situation.En: Building a wooden model airplane using screws to assemble parts.

Meaning.Vi: vặn ốc; siết ốc; quay (vít) vào/chốt lại
Meaning.En: To fasten, attach, or secure something using a screw; to turn or rotate something tightly, often with force.
Meaning.Example: She screwed the shelf to the wall.

Situation.Vi: Vặn ốc để lắp ráp bàn ghế tự làm.
Situation.En: Turning screws to assemble DIY furniture.

Situation.Vi: Siết chặt ốc trong quá trình sửa ống nước.
Situation.En: Tightening a pipe fitting with a screw mechanism during plumbing repair.

Meaning.Vi: đùa (ai đó); lừa (ai đó); làm phiền (ai đó) một cách khó chịu
Meaning.En: To tease, prank, or irritate someone, often playfully but sometimes mockingly.
Meaning.Example: I was just screwing with you—don’t take it so seriously!

Situation.Vi: Nhắn tin đùa vui với bạn, rồi nói “I was just screwing with you!”
Situation.En: Sending a playful teasing message to a friend and clarifying afterward.

Situation.Vi: Đùa nghịch khi đang họp nhóm, khiến đồng nghiệp cười.
Situation.En: Teasing a teammate during a group meeting, prompting laughter.
